testsuite.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200 should have all InkJet Printers links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have all InkJet Printers links with status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200 should have all Laser Printers links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have all Laser Printers links with status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200 should have Dot Matrix Printers links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have Dot Matrix Printers links with status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200 should have Large Format Printers links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have Large Format Printers links with status 200

testcase.name: Checking of all the links on main menu to have status 200 should have all Label Maker Printers links with status 200
testcase.classname: should have all Label Maker Printers links with status 200

failure.message:
`cy.request()` failed on:
https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/en_GB/products/printers/label-makers/c/labelwriter
The response we received from your web server was:
> 404: Not Found
This was considered a failure because the status code was not `2xx` or `3xx`.
If you do not want status codes to cause failures pass the option: `failOnStatusCode: false`
-----------------------------------------------------------
The request we sent was:
Method: GET URL: https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/en_GB/products/printers/label-makers/c/labelwriter Headers: { "Connection": "keep-alive", "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/96.0.4664.110 Safari/537.36", "accept": "*/*", "cookie": "gpv_prevurl=epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com%2Fen_GB%2F; gpv_pn=home; epsonstorefrontRememberMe=bWFyaWEuYm9icm92YSUyQjAzJTQwa2VlbmV0aGljcy5jb206MTY0MjIxMzE2NjYwNzpjZGJiOGY3NDQyOWZiNmFhMjU0ZGIxNDQ0OTcxMjFiYg; OptanonAlertBoxClosed=2022-01-01T02:19:23.385Z; anonymous-consents=%5B%5D; OptanonConsent=isGpcEnabled=0&datestamp=Sat+Jan+01+2022+04%3A19%3A29+GMT%2B0200+(Eastern+European+Standard+Time)&version=6.21.0&isIABGlobal=false&hosts=&consentId=e6f8e420-7e9a-4ca6-8713-953b7f937e31&interactionCount=1&landingPath=NotLandingPage&groups=C0004%3A1%2CC0003%3A1%2CC0002%3A1%2CC0001%3A1&geolocation=UA%3B23&AwaitingReconsent=false; AMCV_C6DD45815AE6DFFD0A495D24%40AdobeOrg=-2121179033%7CMCIDTS%7C18994%7CMCMID%7C04689572918646860384547734955543081991%7CMCAAMLH-1641608362%7C6%7CMCAAMB-1641608362%7CRKhpRz8krg2tLO6pguXWp5olkAcUniQYPHaMWWgdJ3xzPWQmdj0y%7CMCOPTOUT-1641010762s%7CNONE%7CMCSYNCSOP%7C411-19001%7CvVersion%7C5.3.0; mbox=session#9f7c2c115751494da0b7bfe0ab494821#1641005429|PC#9f7c2c115751494da0b7bfe0ab494821.37_0#1704248363; cookie-notification=NOT_ACCEPTED; s_sq=eulepsondev2021%3D%2526c.%2526a.%2526activitymap.%2526page%253Dhome%2526link%253DLabel%252520maker%252520Printers%2526region%253DBODY%2526pageIDType%253D1%2526.activitymap%2526.a%2526.c%2526pid%253Dhome%2526pidt%253D1%2526oid%253Dhttps%25253A%25252F%25252Fepson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com%25252Fen_GB%25252Fc%25252Flabelwriter%2526ot%253DA; JSESSIONID=Y6-beae85f3-3ab8-4a9f-ac7a-41ae67a4c48e.accstorefront-97474cc55-rtpj5; acceleratorSecureGUID=c622ccc83f27f5e24f475f6bfca0229fee8cdec0; s_cc=true; at_check=true; AMCVS_C6DD45815AE6DFFD0A495D24%40AdobeOrg=1; ROUTE=.accstorefront-97474cc55-rtpj5", "accept-encoding": "gzip, deflate" }
-----------------------------------------------------------
The response we got was:
Status: 404 - Not Found Headers: { "date": "Sat, 01 Jan 2022 02:19:29 GMT", "server": "*", "x-frame-options": "", "cache-control": "no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", "pragma": "no-cache", "expires": "0", "strict-transport-security": "max-age=31536000 ; includeSubDomains", "x-xss-protection": "1; mode=block", "x-content-type-options": "nosniff", "content-type": "text/html;charset=UTF-8", "content-language": "en-GB", "vary": "User-Agent", "keep-alive": "timeout=5, max=47", "connection": "Keep-Alive", "transfer-encoding": "chunked" } Body: <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en-GB" dir="ltr"> <head> <title> Page Not Found | Epson United Kindom</title>
